title: Adventure
description: Schema for an OffOn adventure YAML file.

slug.description: Kebab-case URL slug. Must match the folder name.

name.description: Alias for title. Use title or name, not both.

emoji.description: Emoji representing this adventure (e.g. '⚖️'). The generator maps it to a Lucide icon automatically. Use this OR icon, not both.

icon.description: Lucide React icon name (e.g. 'FlaskConical'). Overrides emoji-derived icon when both are present.

story.description: One-paragraph card summary. Omit to derive from backstory[0].

community_category_id.description: Discourse category ID for the leaderboard query. Look it up at https://community.offon.dev/categories.json. Drives ADVENTURE_CATEGORIES in scripts/refresh-leaderboard.mjs.

meta_description.description: Overrides the auto-generated adventure meta description. Use when the default (built from tags) is misleading — e.g. when early tags belong to future levels.

backstory.description: Narrative backstory paragraphs shown on the adventure overview page.

overview.description: Context paragraphs explaining what technologies or concepts the adventure covers. Rendered as a bulleted list under 'Your Mission'.

upcoming_levels.description: Placeholder levels that haven't shipped yet.

levels.description: The challenge levels within this adventure.

deadline.description: ISO 8601 datetime (e.g. '2026-05-26T23:59:00+01:00'). Use 'TODO' as a placeholder — the generator will warn and skip formatting.

eligibility.description: Omit to use the standard eligibility text.

ranking_note.description: Omit to use the standard ranking note.

ranking_rules_url.description: Omit to use the default community ranking rules path.

level.description: Level identifier (beginner, intermediate, expert). Emitted by the sync script so the entry survives re-syncs; may be absent in hand-written entries.
Level identifier: beginner, intermediate, or expert.

title.description: Alias for name. Use name or title, not both.

emoji.description: Difficulty emoji: 🟢 Beginner, 🟡 Intermediate, 🔴 Expert. Use this OR difficulty, not both.

difficulty.description: Explicit difficulty. Omit when using emoji.

learnings.description: Key learnings. Use this OR what_you_learn.

devcontainer.description: Short devcontainer name (e.g. 'lex-imperfecta_beginner'). Generator expands to '.devcontainer/{value}/devcontainer.json'.

discussion_url.description: Full Discourse topic URL or a path relative to COMMUNITY_URL (e.g. '/t/topic-slug/1419').

deadline.description: Submission deadline for this level as an ISO 8601 string (e.g. '2025-12-10T09:00:00+01:00'). Only shown when rewards are active.

summary.description: Alias for intro. Single string; generator wraps in array.

intro.description: Brief intro paragraph(s). Use this OR summary.

estimated_time.description: Optional estimated completion time shown as a pill, e.g. '~30 min' or '1–2 hours'.

architecture_diagram.description: Filename of the SVG diagram in src/assets/diagrams/ (e.g. 'blind-by-design-intermediate.svg'). Takes priority over architecture_ascii.

architecture_ascii.description: ASCII art diagram rendered as a <pre> block when no SVG diagram is available. Use a YAML block scalar (|) to preserve whitespace.

services.description: Services accessible in the Codespace. The generator inserts an 'Explore the UIs' how_to_play step from this list. Use internal: true for services reachable only on the docker-internal network.

id.description: Optional step identifier from the challenges repo. Ignored by the generator.

content.description: Markdown content. Can contain code blocks.

helpful_links.description: Reference documentation links shown at the end of the challenge walkthrough.

meta_description.description: Optional SEO meta description (max 160 chars). Use when the auto-generated description from learnings is insufficient. If omitted, the generator builds one from the level name, learnings, difficulty, and adventure title.
